message:
feat(db): switch SQLite backend from C bindings to pure-Rust FrankenSQLite

Introduce a centralized DbConn type alias backed by
sqlmodel_frankensqlite::FrankenConnection, replacing all direct
sqlmodel_sqlite::SqliteConnection references across 30+ files in the
db, cli, server, share, and bench crates. This eliminates the C FFI
dependency for SQLite, enabling fully self-contained pure-Rust builds
with page-level MVCC and BEGIN CONCURRENT support.

Workspace Cargo.toml updated with sqlmodel-frankensqlite dependency.
Cargo.lock expanded with fsqlite family (16 crates) and transitive
deps (crypto, parsing, hashing primitives).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
